title: DFU - Software Update Page - Disconnecting/Connecting earbuds to check DFU pop up
scenario: Verify that disconnecting and reconnecting earbuds during a DFU process shows a persistent "Update currently not available" popup on the Software Update page.
steps: Connect both earbuds to the device.
Navigate to the Software Update page.
Verify that a popup appears with the message: "Update currently not available, please try back later".
Confirm that the popup persists after reconnection.
Verify that the same popup appears again.
Confirm that the popup persists after reconnection.
expected: The popup "Update currently not available, please try back later" appears when either earbud is disconnected during a DFU process, and persists after reconnection until dismissed.
